login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your Tarjem account
login.error: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
login.brandSubtitle: Connect with sworn translators across Algeria. Fast, secure, and officially recognized translations for all your documents.
login.loginToContinue: Log in to continue with your translation order.

registerClient.title: Create Your Account
registerClient.subtitle: Start ordering certified translations in minutes
registerClient.error: An error occurred while creating the account. Please try again.
registerClient.success: Account created successfully! Welcome to Tarjem.
registerClient.brandSubtitle: Create your free account and get your documents translated by sworn translators in just a few clicks.

benefit1.title: Fast & Easy
benefit1.desc: Upload your document and get a quote instantly.

benefit2.title: Certified & Official
benefit2.desc: All translations are certified by sworn translators.

benefit3.title: Track Your Order
benefit3.desc: Follow every step from translation to delivery.

registerTranslator.title: Join as a Translator
registerTranslator.subtitle: Register your sworn translator profile on Tarjem
registerTranslator.pendingNotice: Your account will be reviewed and approved by the administration before activation.
registerTranslator.pendingMessage: Your application has been submitted! The administration will review your profile and contact you by email or phone.
registerTranslator.error: An error occurred while creating the account. Please try again.
registerTranslator.success: Application submitted! We'll review your profile shortly.
registerTranslator.brandSubtitle: Join Algeria's growing network of certified translators. Set your own schedule, pick your orders, and get paid for every page.

benefit1.title: Flexible Schedule
benefit1.desc: Work on your own time. Pick orders that match your expertise.

benefit2.title: Fair Compensation
benefit2.desc: Transparent per-page rates with commissions paid promptly.

benefit3.title: Growing Platform
benefit3.desc: Steady stream of orders from clients across all 58 wilayas.

order.dropOrClick: Drop a file or click to browse
order.declaration: I declare on my honor that this document is authentic and conforms to the original. Any falsification engages my sole criminal responsibility pursuant to Article 214 of the Algerian Penal Code.
order.downloadDescription: Your translation has been reviewed and approved. You can now download the translated document.

document.declaration: I declare on my honor that this document is authentic and conforms to the original. Any falsification engages my sole criminal responsibility pursuant to Article 214 of the Algerian Penal Code.

hero.subtitle: Connect with sworn translators registered with Algerian courts. Official, fast, and secure.

heroEstimator.tagline: Get your price instantly. No account needed.
heroEstimator.selectToSee: Select languages and pages to see your price
heroEstimator.certifiedSubtitle: Sworn translators registered with Algerian courts

landing.servicesSubtitle: From official court-certified translations to standard professional translation, we cover all your needs.

official.title: Official Certified Translation
official.description: Certified by sworn translators registered with Algerian courts. Legally valid, accepted by all administrations, embassies, and institutions.

standard.title: Standard Professional Translation
standard.description: Professional translation by qualified linguists. Ideal for business, academic, and personal documents. Without official stamp.

howItWorks.title: Simple as 1-2-3
howItWorks.subtitle: From upload to certified document in your hands -- the entire process is digital and transparent.

step1.title: Upload
step1.desc: Upload your document and select the language pair and translation tier.

step2.title: Translate & Review
step2.desc: A qualified sworn translator translates your document, then our team verifies quality and accuracy.

step3.title: Receive
step3.desc: Download your certified document digitally or get it delivered to your door.

review1.text: I needed my birth certificate translated for a visa application. Tarjem delivered it in 24 hours with full certification. Incredible service!
review1.name: Amira Bensalem

review2.text: As a law firm, we use Tarjem for all our certified translations. The quality is consistent and the platform is very easy to use.
review2.name: Maitre Kaddour

review3.text: I translated my medical degree for an equivalence abroad. The translator was professional and the process was fully transparent.
review3.name: Dr. Farid Hadj

cta.title: Ready to Get Your Documents Translated?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Algerians who trust Tarjem for their certified translations.

verification.title: Verifiable Certified Translations
verification.description: Every certified translation issued through Tarjem comes with a unique verification code. Institutions like Campus France, embassies, and universities can instantly verify the authenticity of any document.
verification.feature1: Unique certificate code for every translation
verification.feature2: Instant online verification by any third party

footer.description: Algeria's leading digital platform for certified and professional translation services.

newOrder.title: New Order
newOrder.subtitle: Order your certified translation in a few steps.

newOrder.standardDesc: Professional translation by a qualified linguist. Without official stamp, ideal for personal or professional use.
newOrder.digitalDesc: PDF document available for download immediately after validation
newOrder.physicalDesc: Printed documents delivered to your door + digital version included

verify.title: Tarjem Document Verification
verify.subtitle: Verify the authenticity of a certified translation
verify.infoNote: Enter the certificate code printed on your certified document along with the first 3 letters of the document holder's first and last name. This allows institutions to verify the authenticity of Tarjem translations.
verify.verifiedDesc: This certificate is valid and the document has been authenticated.
verify.revokedDesc: This certificate has been revoked and is no longer valid. Please contact us for more information.
